news.t: Making Advanced Strategies Accessible to Investors, xETFs Launches Its First ETFs
Exchange Traded Concepts Announces Launch of xETFs NVDA Daily Income ETF (NYSE: NYYY) and xETFs TSLA Daily Income ETF (NYSE: TYYY) with xETFs

overview.description: The xETFs TSLA Daily Income ETF (TYYY) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in consumer discretionary equity. The fund actively manages a portfolio designed to replicate the total returns of Tesla, Inc. (Nasdaq: TSLA) through swaps and other derivatives TYYY was launched on May 14, 2026 and is issued by xETFs.

data.title: Making Advanced Strategies Accessible to Investors, xETFs Launches Its First ETFs
data.text: NEW YORK--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Experienced team at xETFs launches first ETFs; single-stock funds seeking daily income without sacrificing significant equity participation.

data.title: Exchange Traded Concepts Announces Launch of xETFs NVDA Daily Income ETF (NYSE: NYYY) and xETFs TSLA Daily Income ETF (NYSE: TYYY) with xETFs
data.text: OKLAHOMA CITY, May 15, 2026 /PRNewswire/ -- Exchange Traded Concepts, LLC ("ETC") today announced, in conjunction with xETFs, the launch of the xETFs NVDA Daily Income ETF (NYSE: NYYY) and the xETFs T...
